title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Akzo Nobel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Akzo Nobel India
jsonLd.description:
We at Akzo Nobel India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!
